parameters.query: SELECT metric_name, value, target, CASE WHEN target IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(value - target, 2) ELSE NULL END AS variance, source FROM canonical_scorecard WHERE week = (SELECT MAX(week) FROM canonical_scorecard) ORDER BY metric_name;

meta.description: GET /webhook/scorecard — returns latest weekly scorecard metrics with targets and variance. Used by Glance Rocks & Scorecard page.
